g.text: read spec, status, delete intent, and OCI lifecycle
- The current formal notes keep field-level drift specifics
in Go code and property tests even though the controller
now reconciles tags and compartment moves.
- Confirm deletion with follow-up GetVcn calls until the
resource is gone or not found.
unsupported or immutable drift is detected
wait for the spec or live state to change
OCI deletion is confirmed and the finalizer can be removed
